name: harness
description: AI Agent Harness Engineering plugin. Initialize new projects, audit existing harness health, plan with structured triple-format tasks, verify completion with rigid/flexible constraints, and archive specs — all in one install.

team_name.description: Team name (used in sprint reports and features.json labels, e.g. 'Backend Team')

default_tech_stack.description: Default tech stack (typescript / python / go / java / generic) — auto-selects template during project init
